message.content:
Explore how e2e tests are structured and how external services (MySQL, Redis) are set up for testing.

Focus on:
1. Test setup/teardown patterns in existing e2e tests
2. How MySQL and Redis are initialized and cleaned up between tests
3. Test helper utilities (check test/test-helpers/ or similar)
4. BeforeAll/afterAll/beforeEach/afterEach patterns
5. How environment variables are used in tests
6. Database reset mechanisms (check for db:reset:test or similar scripts in package.json)

Look at files like:
- test/**/*.e2e-spec.ts (sample a few to understand patterns)
- test/test-helpers/**/*
- Any test setup utilities or global test configuration
- package.json test scripts

Provide file paths and code examples of the patterns you find.

content.text: I'll explore the e2e test structure and how external services are set up. Let me start by examining the test directory and related configuration.

     3Ôćĺimport { IStyleColorBase } from '@modules/db/style-colors/types/style-color.base.interface';
     4Ôćĺimport { IStyleBase } from '@modules/db/styles/types/style.base.interface';

    25Ôćĺ		minimum_quantity: 1,

    27Ôćĺ		min_qty: 1,
    28Ôćĺ		rating_count: 1,
    29Ôćĺ		rating_score: 1,
    30Ôćĺ		sizes: ['Size 1', 'Size 2'],
    31Ôćĺ		style_type: 'Style Type',
    32Ôćĺ		price_level: 1,
    33Ôćĺ		product_type: 'Product Type',
    34Ôćĺ		primary_category_name: 'Primary Category Name',
    35Ôćĺ		broad_category_names: ['Broad Category 1', 'Broad Category 2'],
    36Ôćĺ		sub_category_names: ['Sub Category 1', 'Sub Category 2'],
    37Ôćĺ		style_card_image_url: 'https://example.com/style-card.png',
    38Ôćĺ		link_path: 'https://example.com/style-link',
    39Ôćĺ		brand: ['Brand 1', 'Brand 2'],
    40Ôćĺ		turn_time: 1,
    41Ôćĺ		rush_turn_time: 1,
    42Ôćĺ		no_minimum: true,
    43Ôćĺ		created_at: new Date('2024-01-01'),
    44Ôćĺ		updated_at: new Date('2024-01-01'),
    45Ôćĺ		deleted_at: null,
    46Ôćĺ		...overrides,
    47Ôćĺ	};
    48Ôćĺ}
    49Ôćĺ
    50Ôćĺexport function createMockStyleColor(
    51Ôćĺ	overrides: Partial<IStyleColorBase> = {},
    52Ôćĺ): IStyleColorBase {
    53Ôćĺ	return {
    54Ôćĺ		_id: '1',
    55Ôćĺ		style_id: 123456,
    56Ôćĺ		color_id: 1,
    57Ôćĺ		color_rgb: '#FF0000',

    64Ôćĺ		...overrides,

    67Ôćĺ
    68Ôćĺexport async function createMockStyleInDB(
    69Ôćĺ	knex: Knex,
    70Ôćĺ	styleData: Partial<IStyleBase> = {},
    71Ôćĺ): Promise<void> {
    72Ôćĺ	const uniqueId = styleData._id ?? `style_${styleData.style_id ?? Date.now()}`;
    73Ôćĺ	const mockStyle = createMockStyle({ ...styleData, _id: uniqueId });
    74Ôćĺ
    75Ôćĺ	const existing = await knex(TABLE_NAME_STYLES)
    76Ôćĺ		.where({ style_id: mockStyle.style_id })
    77Ôćĺ		.first();
    78Ôćĺ
    79Ôćĺ	if (!existing) {
    80Ôćĺ		await knex(TABLE_NAME_STYLES).insert({
    81Ôćĺ			...mockStyle,
    82Ôćĺ			categories_ids: JSON.stringify(mockStyle.categories_ids),
    83Ôćĺ			categories_with_parents_ids: JSON.stringify(mockStyle.categories_with_parents_ids),
    84Ôćĺ			sizes: JSON.stringify(mockStyle.sizes),
    85Ôćĺ			broad_category_names: JSON.stringify(mockStyle.broad_category_names),
    86Ôćĺ			sub_category_names: JSON.stringify(mockStyle.sub_category_names),
    87Ôćĺ			brand: JSON.stringify(mockStyle.brand),
    88Ôćĺ		});
    89Ôćĺ	}
    90Ôćĺ}

    13Ôćĺ		"build": "nest build && npm run build:migrations && npm run copy:assets",
    14Ôćĺ		"build:migrations": "tsc --project src/migrations/tsconfig.json && tsc-alias -p src/migrations/tsconfig.json",
    15Ôćĺ		"copy:assets": "cp -r src/assets dist/assets",
    16Ôćĺ		"format": "prettier --write \"src/**/*.ts\" \"test/**/*.ts\"",
    17Ôćĺ		"type-check": "tsc --noEmit",
    18Ôćĺ		"start": "nest start -e 'node -r newrelic'",
    19Ôćĺ		"start:dev": "nest start --watch --webpack --webpackPath webpack.config.js",
    20Ôćĺ		"­čÉÄ": "nest start --watch --webpack --webpackPath webpack.config.js",
    21Ôćĺ		"start:debug": "nest start --debug --watch --webpack --webpackPath webpack.config.js",
    22Ôćĺ		"start:prod": "node dist/main",
    23Ôćĺ		"lint": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\"",
    24Ôćĺ		"lint:fix": "eslint \"{src,apps,libs,test}/**/*.ts\" --fix",
    25Ôćĺ		"code-quality-check": "npm run lint && npm run format && npm run type-check",
    26Ôćĺ		"test:unit": "dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.config.ts",
    27Ôćĺ		"test:e2e": "npm run db:reset:test && dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --runInBand --forceExit --config ./test/jest-e2e.config.ts",
    28Ôćĺ		"test:unit:coverage": "dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.coverage.config.ts",
    29Ôćĺ		"test:e2e:coverage": "npm run db:reset:test && dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --runInBand --forceExit --config ./test/jest-e2e.coverage.config.ts",
    30Ôćĺ		"test": "npm run code-quality-check && (npm run test:unit & npm run test:e2e & wait)",
    31Ôćĺ		"test:coverage": "npm run code-quality-check && (npm run test:unit:coverage & npm run test:e2e:coverage & wait)",
    32Ôćĺ		"prepare": "husky || true",
    33Ôćĺ		"artillery-load-test": "npx artillery run --environment test --output report.json --record --key $ARTILLERY_KEY ./src/scripts/load-testing/artillery.yml",
    34Ôćĺ		"cli:dev": "ts-node --log-error -r tsconfig-paths/register src/cli.ts",
    35Ôćĺ		"cli:prod": "node dist/cli.js",
    36Ôćĺ		"migrate": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:latest --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts && npm run generate:db-uml",
    37Ôćĺ		"migrate:prod": "node -r dotenv/config ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:latest --knexfile ./dist/knexfile.prod.js",
    38Ôćĺ		"migrate:rollback": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:rollback --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts",
    39Ôćĺ		"migrate:up": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:up --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts && npm run generate:db-uml",
    40Ôćĺ		"migrate:down": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:down --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts",
    41Ôćĺ		"migrate:make": "ts-node -r dotenv/config -r tsconfig-paths/register ./node_modules/.bin/knex migrate:make --knexfile ./src/knexfile.ts -x ts",
    42Ôćĺ		"db:reset:test": "dotenv -e .env.test -- ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ./scripts/reset-test-db.ts",
    43Ôćĺ		"generate:db-uml": "dotenv -e .env -- ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register ./src/scripts/generate-db-uml.script.ts"
